findings.evidence: Existing API: `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor.lean:489: lemma pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup {w : X → ℤ} {x y : X} (h : w x = w y) : pointDifference x y ∈ weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup w`; new duplicate: `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/BasepointChange.lean:75: lemma basepointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup ...`.
findings.fix: Remove the new lemma and use `pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup (w := w) (x := x₀) (y := y₀) h` at the call site.
findings.issue: `basepointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup` is only a renamed copy of the existing `pointDifference_mem_weightedDegreeZeroSubgroup`.

summary: The PR adds at least one declaration that is a direct duplicate of existing TauCeti API rather than reusing it.
